problem id: e8f79d26
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00011011 -> 11010101
  00011001 -> 11000100
  01001010 -> 01110101
  10011000 -> 10001100
  00100111 -> 00101011
  01111001 -> 11110100
  10111101 -> 10110110
  00001111 -> 01111111
  10101101 -> 00111110

query: 11001010
predicted answer: 00110101
